Review PageAI?

Reviews [...] can host it yourself or just download the code. But that's not all. Each generated codebase comes with tons of features, mobile, performance & SEO optimizations. So you can ship faster and with confidence: ✨ Use our beautiful to setup - color system - font system - beautifully designed landing page (with custom components) - logo, Open Graph image, favicon - SEO meta tags - powerful SEO-optimized blog with built-in search - sitemap and rss - themed UI library (Shadcn UI) - dark mode - And more: pricing page, privacy & terms pages (starters),navigation, footer, social links, the list goes on! ✨ The blog is optimized for SEO and has - search - tags / filters - authors - pagination - multiple post layouts - support for custom components - syntax highlighting (with SSR) & tons of [...] components - syntax highlighting (with SSR) & tons of pre-configured plugins - And much more! ✨ This is all powered by - Next.js 15 🆕 - Typescript - TailwindCSS - Shadcn UI - Markdown (mdx) So you can keep building on top of it for years to come. We hope you'll use Page AI to generate many websites and I can't wait to see what you'll build with it! Looking forward to your feedback & thanks for dropping by 🫶 Dan

# Introducing design systems in v0

by

Tabstack by Mozilla

Tabstack by Mozilla

•

You can now create design systems in @v0 by Vercel.

 Create unique color schemes for your v0 generations
 Adjust the colors for a design system right from Design Mode
 Preview in light & dark mode

Their team also is working on support for advanced design systems features like fonts, custom components, AI-generated design systems, and more.

 Watch the product announcement on X →
 Get started with v0.app →

Subscribe [...] 401 views

### Replies

Best

Vatsal M

This looks like an upgrade to our prototyping process for new SAAS apps. I can now choose across so many colour options for my apps, YAY!  
  
But, for it to be a full on design system it should also allow us to tweak things other than color values like border styles, typography, spacings, grid system, etc. Currently it gives us ability to test our app UI in various color palettes very quickly which is great but having the other design capabilities would make it a complete 'design system' system.

Report

fmerian

Tabstack by Mozilla

Tabstack by Mozilla

@vatsmi spot on! it definitely needs to support more design tokens. it's in the roadmap afaik, looking forward to it.

results.content:
Really appreciate you bringing this up thoughtfully — feedback like this genuinely helps shape the product better.

Report

George Sostak

@adityarajdigital thanks for considering this improvement, as at this exact moment, I'm in process of creation design.md file for the new app and 'internal' UI is 80% of the design.md

Report

Aditya Raj

DesignMD 

DesignMD

Maker

@gsostak Yeah, really appreciate you bringing this up honestly 🤝

I’m still building/improving things step by step, and as a solo builder it takes time organizing and exploring all these directions properly 😅

But internal product UI understanding is definitely something I want to go deeper into.

Report [...] Report

Rivra

Retrofitting existing sites for AI readiness is a huge pain point. Does DesignMD automatically map existing CSS variables to modern design system tokens?

Report

Aditya Raj

DesignMD 

DesignMD

Maker

@rivra\_dev Yes — that’s one of the core goals behind DesignMD.

The system analyzes live DOM/CSSOM structure and attempts to extract existing frontend primitives including CSS variables, spacing scales, typography systems, color tokens, breakpoints, and interaction patterns directly from production implementations.

Instead of treating the UI as static screenshots, DesignMD tries to map real implementation details into a more structured, reusable design-system-oriented format that can be used for documentation, recreation, or AI-assisted workflows. [...] Subscribe

DesignMD analyzes live websites and extracts structured design intelligence including typography, spacing, colors, motion systems, breakpoints, and AI-ready prompts. Built for designers, frontend engineers, and AI builders who want to understand, document, and recreate production-grade interfaces faster. Paste any URL and generate actionable design system insights instantly.
